ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state where the station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state where the station is located */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code for the county where the station is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county where the station is located */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code where the station is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES cbsa_codes ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "standard_limit" REAL /* Standard limit for the pollutant concentration */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Description of the health impact of the pollutant */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the pollutant is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected from the source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., API, manual input, automated script) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last synchronized from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being monitored */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "daily_max_8hr_concentration" REAL /* Daily maximum 8-hour concentration of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the concentration */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily AQI value */,
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* AQS parameter code */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* AQS parameter description */,
  "hourly_concentration" REAL /* Hourly concentration of the pollutant */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was recorded */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data to track changes over time */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data */,
  "data_source_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa_codes" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* CBSA name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the CBSA */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the CBSA */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the CBSA in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
